restaurants.name: Terroni Adelaide
restaurants.description: Classic Southern Italian restaurant set in a historic space, known for traditional pasta, pizza, and an energetic dining room.

restaurants.name: Black + Blue Steakhouse
restaurants.address: 130 King St W, Toronto, ON M5X 2A2
restaurants.description: Upscale steakhouse offering premium cuts of beef and a refined atmosphere suited for business dining.

restaurants.name: BARO
restaurants.address: 485 King St W, Toronto, ON M5V 1K4
restaurants.description: Modern Latin-inspired restaurant featuring shareable plates, cocktails, and a lively multi-level space.

restaurants.name: AloBar Downtown
restaurants.description: Polished downtown restaurant offering approachable, seasonal dishes in a professional setting.

restaurants.name: REIGN (Fairmont Royal York)
restaurants.description: Elegant hotel restaurant and bar focused on seasonal Canadian cuisine and an extensive wine selection.

restaurants.name: HotHouse Restaurant & Bar
restaurants.description: Spacious downtown restaurant serving a wide range of Italian-influenced and international dishes.

restaurants.name: WVRST (King West)
restaurants.address: 609 King St W, Toronto, ON M5V 1M5
restaurants.description: Casual beer hall specializing in artisanal sausages and an extensive craft beer selection.

restaurants.name: Irish Embassy Pub & Grill
restaurants.description: Traditional Irish pub offering classic comfort food and a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere.

restaurants.name: The Chase
restaurants.address: 10 Temperance St, 5th Floor, Toronto, ON M5H 1Y4
restaurants.description: Rooftop restaurant in the historic Dineen Building, featuring contemporary Canadian and seafood-forward cuisine.

restaurants.name: Athens Restaurant (Danforth / Greektown)
restaurants.description: Long-standing Greektown restaurant known for classic Greek dishes and a traditional dining experience.

restaurants.name: Messini Authentic Gyros (Danforth / Greektown)
restaurants.description: Popular Greektown eatery specializing in gyros, souvlaki, and other casual Greek staples.

restaurants.name: Gabby's (Danforth & Pape)
restaurants.description: Casual neighbourhood bar and grill offering familiar pub fare in an informal setting.

restaurants.name: Daldongnae Korean BBQ (Koreatown)
restaurants.description: High-energy Korean BBQ restaurant known for tabletop grilling and classic banchan.

restaurants.name: Yummy Korean Food Restaurant (Koreatown)
restaurants.address: 620 Bloor St W, Toronto, ON M6G 1K7
restaurants.description: Casual Koreatown staple serving comforting Korean dishes such as stews, noodles, and rice bowls.

restaurants.name: Kintori Yakitori Izakaya (Koreatown)
restaurants.address: 668 Bloor St W, 2nd Floor, Toronto, ON M6G 1L2
restaurants.description: Japanese yakitori and small-plates izakaya focusing on skewers, shareable dishes, and drinks.

restaurants.name: Canoe Restaurant
restaurants.address: 66 Wellington St W, Toronto, ON M5K 1H6
restaurants.description: Refined Canadian restaurant with a quiet, professional dining room and panoramic city views, well suited for business conversations.

restaurants.name: Planta Queen
restaurants.address: 180 Queen St W, Toronto, ON M5V 3X3
restaurants.description: Plant-based restaurant focused on modern Asian-inspired dishes, making it an excellent vegetarian-forward dining option.

restaurants.name: Rol San Restaurant
restaurants.description: Large, bustling Cantonese restaurant offering budget-friendly dishes ideal for groups, located farther from the downtown business core.
